mnemonics.title: NTFS MFT System Files
mnemonics.content: **M**y **M**ighty **L**ion **V**anquishes **A**ll **R**oyal **B**easts **B**oldly **S**eeking **U**nlimited **E**nergy. (MFT, MFTMirr, LogFile, Volume, AttrDef, Root, Bitmap, Boot, BadClus, Secure, UpCase, Extend)

mnemonics.title: FAT Deletion Marker
mnemonics.content: **E**rasure **5**ignals Deletion. (The first character is set to 0xE5)

mnemonics.title: ext4 inode Timestamps
mnemonics.content: **C**reated, **M**odified, **A**ccessed, **C**hanged. (i_crtime, i_mtime, i_atime, i_ctime - note 'Changed' is the inode change time, not the file content change time)
